description: Prompt definitions for Notion2API MCP operations, debugging, schema writing, validation, and redaction.

prompts.name: notion2api_operator
prompts.title: Operate Notion2API MCP safely
prompts.description: Use Notion2API MCP with safe read/write behavior, audit-friendly summaries, and non-destructive defaults.

prompts.name: notion2api_tool_router
prompts.title: Route Notion2API MCP requests
prompts.description: Classify a user request as read, write, update, debug, schema, admin, or export before selecting MCP actions.

arguments.name: user_request
arguments.description: The user request to classify and route.

prompts.name: notion2api_output_schema_writer
prompts.title: Write MCP output schemas
prompts.description: Create or repair predictable MCP output schemas for Notion2API tool responses.

arguments.name: operation_name
arguments.description: The Notion2API or MCP operation that needs an output schema.

arguments.name: current_schema
arguments.description: Existing schema or observed response shape, if available.

prompts.name: notion2api_provider_debugger
prompts.title: Debug Notion2API provider failures
prompts.description: Diagnose Notion2API MCP, provider, model-routing, timeout, streaming, 502, 503, and empty-content failures.

arguments.name: error_log
arguments.description: Redacted error text, status code, or failure report.

arguments.name: operation
arguments.description: The operation or endpoint that failed.

prompts.name: notion2api_content_sync
prompts.title: Sync content into Notion
prompts.description: Safely create, update, or append Notion content with idempotency and non-destructive defaults.

arguments.name: content
arguments.description: The content to sync into Notion.

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Target page, database, parent, or workspace section.

prompts.name: notion2api_regression_validation
prompts.title: Validate Notion2API MCP changes
prompts.description: Run a repeatable validation plan for Notion2API MCP fixes and integration changes.

arguments.name: change_summary
arguments.description: Summary of the code, config, or behavior change to validate.

prompts.name: notion2api_security_redaction
prompts.title: Redact Notion2API diagnostics
prompts.description: Redact sensitive tokens, cookies, signed URLs, API keys, and private content from Notion2API logs or reports.

arguments.name: raw_text
arguments.description: The log, config, diagnostic output, or report text to redact.
